boundary: GTX 1070 evidence validates OptiX prepared-scene behavior only. RTX RT-core speedup claims require RTX-class hardware.

dbscan_clustering.claim_scope: prepared fixed-radius scalar core-count traversal only
dbscan_clustering.cloud_policy: include in the single active RTX batch only after local pre-cloud readiness passes
dbscan_clustering.non_claim: not per-point core flags, not full DBSCAN clustering, cluster expansion, KNN, Hausdorff, ANN, Barnes-Hut, or whole-app RTX speedup

outlier_detection.claim_scope: prepared fixed-radius scalar threshold-count traversal only
outlier_detection.cloud_policy: include in the single active RTX batch only after local pre-cloud readiness passes
outlier_detection.non_claim: not per-point outlier labels, KNN, Hausdorff, ANN, Barnes-Hut, anomaly-system, row-output, or whole-app RTX speedup

cloud_claim_contract.claim_scope: prepared fixed-radius scalar threshold-count traversal only
cloud_claim_contract.cloud_policy: include in the single active RTX batch only after local pre-cloud readiness passes
cloud_claim_contract.non_claim: not per-point outlier labels, KNN, Hausdorff, ANN, Barnes-Hut, anomaly-system, row-output, or whole-app RTX speedup

phase_contract.native_warm_query: prepared_obj.count_threshold_reached only: OptiX traversal, threshold counting, and scalar count copy-back
phase_contract.validation: oracle construction/comparison timing; omitted when skip_validation=true

cloud_claim_contract.claim_scope: prepared fixed-radius scalar core-count traversal only
cloud_claim_contract.cloud_policy: include in the single active RTX batch only after local pre-cloud readiness passes
cloud_claim_contract.non_claim: not per-point core flags, not full DBSCAN clustering, cluster expansion, KNN, Hausdorff, ANN, Barnes-Hut, or whole-app RTX speedup

phase_contract.native_warm_query: prepared_obj.count_threshold_reached only: OptiX traversal, threshold counting, and scalar count copy-back
phase_contract.postprocess: none in scalar-summary mode; full DBSCAN cluster expansion remains outside this profiler
phase_contract.validation: oracle construction/comparison timing; omitted when skip_validation=true
